name: ratchet-guide
title: Ratchet system guide
description: Shareable product-design documentation for a Ratchet-style AI build-and-verify control plane. Public-safe educational concepts only; no secrets, no real hostnames, no filesystem maps, no host operations runbooks or operator procedures.

documents.title: Ratchet system guide (v1.2) — pack index, start paths, and read order
Elevator pitch, happy-path flow, and component cheat sheet
System map, trust boundaries, end-to-end product flow
Load-bearing design rules: live is truth, proof of work, streaks, no secrets in builder env
Logical product areas (control plane, harness, product shells) — not a host path map
Loop contract, version signal, mission shape, and verdict ideas
Composer product UX: goal capture, queue, product shells
Optional overnight helpers: observe only, never implement product features
Credentials boundary shape: broker secrets, never export to agents
Pack scope: what this guide includes and deliberately excludes
Greenfield product milestones in phases A–E
Paste-ready educational prompts for rebuild, new product, and friend share
Design pitfalls: contracts, boundaries, and fix directions
Mermaid gallery: happy path, trust boundaries, loop state, credentials sequence, rebuild phases
Single-sheet printable summary of the whole system
Print/PDF-friendly self-contained HTML rendering of the one-pager (letter, inline SVG, no external assets) — served at the extensionless clean URL; backed by one-pager-print.html
Documentation pack history and versioning notes
